name: Inversed World
short_description: Inversed World is A minimalist 2D platformer designed for speedruns.Beat 20 levels as fast as possible or test your skills in Endless Mode.
detailed_description:
Do you like 2D platformer games?
Then you're in the right place.

Inversed World is a minimalist 2D platformer created specifically with speedrunning in mind.
Your goal is simple: complete all levels in the shortest time possible.

Game Description

Inversed World focuses on fast movement, precision jumps, and mastering mechanics.
The timer starts the moment you move, so every second matters.

The game features 20 handcrafted levels, each designed to challenge your reflexes and consistency.

Game Modes

Speedrun Mode
Finish all levels as fast as possible and improve your personal best time.

Endless Mode
Survive for as long as you can, earn points, and test how far your skills can take you.

Achievements

The game includes 5 achievements tied to progression and performance.

Community

Join the community and share your runs:
